mechanism: Mark-to-model suppression of measured volatility by 2-3x and migration of $1.5T beyond observable pricing degrades the credit cycle indicators that would normally signal rising risk. This allows the carry trap to deepen undetected, with the traditional credit cycle dashboard structurally lagged.
regime_dependence: Intensifies with private credit AUM growth; most dangerous in late cycle when true losses are accumulating but marks are lagged by 4-5 years based on historical opacity analogues.
